generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for autonomous vehicle speed control"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles directional control through lower-level chassis interface of Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Executes emergency braking commands triggered remotely via Digital Twin User Entity"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environment mapping and object detection sensor using Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Visual perception and object tracking using Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraFeedData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time speed monitoring embedded in lower-level chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle monitoring embedded in upper-level chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraFeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN algorithm in Python for clustering raw LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements Kalman filter in MATLAB/Simulink for tracking object states from clustered point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 performance class I for basic speed control without road curvature"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks including position, velocity, and size derived from LiDAR and camera data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point clouds from Hokuyo UST-10LX sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance RawCameraFeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw camera feeds from Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraFeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance TimeseriesDatabaseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured timeseries data stored in external SQL database for analysis"
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles point cloud clustering and tracking using DBSCAN and Kalman filter algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingService
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Transforms raw sensor data into interpretable formats (object tracks, vehicle state)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes Adaptive Cruise Control logic based on processed sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles data serialization and translation with unit conversions for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular integration framework for application modules using ROS2 topics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCControlService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Jetpack50SDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software development kit for NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano programming"
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External SQL database for storing timeseries data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService, DataStorageService
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D rendering of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoMicrocomputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for onboard processing"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller for motor actuation"
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic execution with dynamic parameter adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceInsight, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC, speed modification, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction, ACCControlAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable timeseries reports stored in external SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceInsight, PerformanceReportInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Long-term storage of ego vehicle state and object tracks in external SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataPreProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transforms raw sensor data into interpretable formats for further processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides EgoVehicleStateDataModel, ObjectTracksDataModel
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of speed, steering angle, and sensor inputs"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of detected objects with position, velocity, and size"
]

instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical data on ACC efficiency, fuel economy, and driving performance"
]

instance MaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Early detection of brake system degradation via predictive maintenance analysis"
]

instance PerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structured timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state for analysis"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Long-term storage and analysis of vehicle state and object tracks data"
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of ACC parameters based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote triggering of emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling/disabling of ACC and modification of desired speed"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano with lower/upper chassis integration for autonomy components"
    base:contains JetsonOrinNanoMicrocomputer,
                VedderElectronicSpeedController,
                HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR,
                IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera,
                VehicleSpeedSensor,
                VehicleSteeringAngleSensor,
                MotorActuator,
                SteeringServoActuator,
                EmergencyBrakingActuator
]

// C1: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Deployed on external hardware for compute-intensive tasks like ACC control and data storage"
    base:contains ACCControlEnabler,
                SQLDatabaseEnabler,
                DataTranslationEnabler,
                ROS2MiddlewareEnabler
]

// C1: User Entity
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized UI components accessible via networked devices"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationEnabler,
                ControlPanelEnabler
]

instance ControlPanelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "User interface for remote management of ACC parameters and emergency commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C1: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle digital twin system with decentralized components"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity,
                DigitalTwinEntity,
                UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the Digital Twin Entity, transmitted back to the PT for motor actuation.
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) sent from the **Control Panel User Interface FE** to the **Actuation FE** in the Physical Twin Entity.
  - **Actuation signals** (motor voltage, steering commands) generated by the **Actuation FE** and executed on the PT's **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with:
  - **Real-time synchronization** for ACC control, adhering to a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication).
  - **Clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms** across devices to ensure event ordering and data integrity in distributed operations.
  - **Perception cycle updates** (object tracks, vehicle state) at frequencies dictated by sensor refresh rates (e.g., LiDAR and camera feeds)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Entities**:
    1. **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **Data Pre-Processing FE** (point cloud processing) and **Actuation FE** (motor/steering commands).
    2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Executes **ACC Controlling FE**, **Data Collection FE**, **Reporting FE**, and **Data Storage** (external SQL).
    3. **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization FE** and **Control Panel FE** for human-machine interaction.
  - **Deployment**:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on PT's **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (edge computing).
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on external hardware (cloud/edge) for compute-intensive tasks.
    - **User Entity**: Accessible via networked devices (e.g., laptops) for remote monitoring/management.
  - **Data Flow**: Sensor data propagates from PT → **Data Pre-Processing FE** → **Data Collection FE** → **Digital Twin Entity** → **User Entity** for visualization/reporting."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle phases:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD design** and simulators (e.g., CREO Simulate for predictive maintenance).
  - **Operation Phase**: Enables **real-time optimization** (fuel economy, driving performance) and **health monitoring** of the PT (e.g., brake system prognosis).
  - **Product Lifecycle Management**: Supports **digital threads** for continuous end-to-end information flow, integrating data from design to operation.
  The DT represents the PT **as operated**, with real-time synchronization and remote management capabilities."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **100 ms latency** and **100 ms clock accuracy** for event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**:
    - Compliance with **ISO 15622** for ACC performance class I.
    - **DBSCAN + Kalman filter** for accurate object tracking.
    - **3D Visualization FE** for transparent HMI, aligning with **ADAS trust principles**.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Limited by hardware constraints (e.g., **Jetson Orin Nano** compute limits), mitigated via cloud offloading for ACC logic.
  - **Verification**: Publicly available **source code** and **demonstration** for reproducibility and third-party validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Intra-Entity Communication**: **ROS2 topics** for message passing between SW components (e.g., LiDAR → Point Cloud Clustering → Data Collection).
  - **Inter-Entity Communication**: **Wi-Fi network** (UDP/TCP) for data exchange between **Physical Twin Entity**, **Digital Twin Entity**, and **User Entity**.
  - **Data Translation**: **Data Translation FE** serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions (e.g., motor voltage commands, sensor units).
  - **Network Protocols**: **ROS2** (intra-entity), **Wi-Fi** (inter-entity), with potential integration of **OPC UA** for standardized communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the PT's **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (edge device) for low-latency sensor processing and actuation.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **external hardware** (cloud/edge) to handle compute-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic, data storage).
  - **User Entity**: Accessible via **networked devices** (e.g., laptops) for remote monitoring/management.
  - **Data Storage**: External **SQL database** for long-term storage of timeseries data, decoupled from the PT."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration includes:
  - **External Information Systems**: Potential integration with **vehicle manufacturer databases** for fleet-wide analytics.
  - **Standardized Interfaces**: Compliance with **ISO 23247 RA** and **ISO 15622** for interoperability with other DTs or automotive systems.
  - **Data Exchange**: **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** enable communication with external tools (e.g., **MATLAB/Simulink** for simulation, **SQL databases** for analytics)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247 (Part 2)**: Reference architecture for DT development, adapted for automotive use with customizations (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity**, split **User Interface FE**).
  - **ISO 15622**: Standard for ACC performance class I, guiding the implementation of basic speed control logic.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Specifies **100 ms end-to-end latency** for V2V communication, ensuring real-time synchronization.
  - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for modular software integration in robotics and autonomous systems."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Latency Constraints**: **100 ms maximum latency** to prevent real-time control failures (e.g., collision avoidance).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: **100 ms accuracy** for distributed event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Remote Operation Safety**: Emergency braking commands are directly executable on the PT, with **hardware-level actuation** (motor/steering servos) to ensure physical safety.
  - **Data Integrity**: **Data Translation FE** validates and converts data to prevent malformed commands or sensor errors.
  - **Hardware Redundancy**: Critical functions (e.g., emergency braking) are prioritized on the PT's **Jetson Orin Nano** to mitigate cloud/edge failures.
  - **Safety-Critical Validation**: Compliance with **ISO 15622** for ACC ensures adherence to automotive safety standards."
]
